reference: How would I go about getting my old medication, Adderall? I haven't needed it in quite a while, but my Attention Deficit Disorder is getting out of control again and it is very irritating. I was seeing a doctor here in Atlanta about three years ago, and now I can't even find him. I am twenty-five years old and I am beginning school this Monday. Please help!
text: How would I go about getting my old medication, Adderall? I haven't needed it for quite a while, but my attention deficit disorder is getting out of control again, and it is very irritating. I was seeing a doctor here in Atlanta about 3 years ago, and now I can't even find it. I am 25 years old, and I am beginning school this Monday. Please help.
